title: Stakeholder event on competition and data protection: save the date
summary: Brussels, 23 April – The EDPB is organising a remote stakeholder event in the context of its joint work with the European Commission on upcoming guidelines on the interplay between competition and data protection. The event will take place on 29 June 2026 and is an opportunity for stakeholders to in...
